title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description:
NovaSaaS is a fast-growing B2B platform serving 500+ enterprise clients. We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to own core product features end-to-end.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build scalable RESTful APIs with Python and FastAPI
- Develop responsive frontends with React and TypeScript
- Optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries for high-volume data
- Deploy and manage infrastructure on AWS (EC2, RDS, ECS, Lambda)
- Drive technical decisions and mentor junior engineers
- Participate in Agile sprints, code reviews, and architecture discussions

Requirements:
- 5+ years of full-stack development experience
- Strong Python backend skills (FastAPI, Django, or Flask)
- Proficient in React and TypeScript with Redux or Zustand
- Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
- Solid understanding of Docker, CI/CD, and cloud deployments
- Excellent written and verbal communication

Nice to have:
- Experience with Celery and Redis for background jobs
- GraphQL API design
- Prior SaaS or fintech domain experience

title: Senior Backend Engineer — AI Platform
description:
Cognify Labs builds AI-native analytics tools for enterprise data teams. We need a Senior Backend Engineer who can architect and scale the systems behind our LLM-powered platform.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain high-performance Python APIs using FastAPI
- Integrate LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) into production pipelines
- Design data models and pipelines on Snowflake for analytics workloads
- Implement secure, multi-tenant architecture on AWS
- Collaborate with ML engineers to productionize model inference
- Own reliability, observability, and incident response for backend services

Requirements:
- 6+ years of backend Python development
- Production experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, function calling, embeddings)
- Familiarity with Snowflake or similar analytical data warehouses
- Strong knowledge of AWS services (Lambda, ECS, RDS, IAM)
- Experience with async Python and streaming APIs

Nice to have:
- Vector databases (Pinecone, pgvector)
- Prompt engineering and RAG architecture experience
- Prior fintech or data-platform background

title: Lead Frontend Engineer
description:
Launchpad Digital delivers high-traffic consumer products used by millions globally. We are seeking a Lead Frontend Engineer to set the technical direction for our React-based platform.

Responsibilities:
- Lead frontend architecture decisions across multiple product teams
- Build and maintain performant Next.js applications with TypeScript
- Establish component library standards and design system integration
- Drive Core Web Vitals improvements (LCP, CLS, INP)
- Partner with backend engineers to design GraphQL schemas and API contracts
- Mentor a team of 4–6 frontend engineers

Requirements:
- 7+ years of frontend development; 3+ years with React in production
- Deep Next.js knowledge (SSR, SSG, ISR, App Router)
- TypeScript expert — strict mode, generics, utility types
- Strong understanding of browser performance, bundle optimization, and caching
- Experience with GraphQL clients (Apollo or urql)

Nice to have:
- Experience with Webpack or Vite build tooling
- React Native or cross-platform mobile exposure
- Prior experience leading a frontend team

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — Fintech
description:
ClearLedger provides real-time financial data infrastructure for banking and investment firms. We are hiring a Senior Full Stack Engineer to help scale our compliance-critical systems.

Responsibilities:
- Extend our Django/DRF backend APIs serving financial data at scale
- Build React dashboards for complex data visualization
- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas handling millions of transactions
- Implement strict security and auditability requirements (SOC 2)
- Own CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions and deploy to AWS
- Lead code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices

Requirements:
- 5+ years of full-stack development in Python and JavaScript
- Strong Django REST Framework experience
- React with TypeScript for production dashboards
- PostgreSQL performance tuning — indexes, query plans, partitioning
- Docker and containerized deployments
- Understanding of fintech compliance requirements is a plus

Nice to have:
- Celery for background financial processing
- Experience with regulated industries (banking, insurance)
- AWS security services (IAM, Secrets Manager, KMS)

title: Senior Python Developer — Healthcare SaaS
description:
MedFlow Systems builds workflow automation software for radiology and healthcare administration. We need a Senior Python Developer to own critical backend features on our HIPAA-compliant platform.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain Django backend services and REST APIs
- Implement background processing with Celery and Redis
- Develop secure authentication flows including OAuth 2.0
- Collaborate with frontend engineers on React UI integration
- Ensure HIPAA compliance across data storage and transmission
- Write comprehensive test suites (PyTest, 90%+ coverage target)

Requirements:
- 5+ years Python development; 3+ years with Django
- Experience building HIPAA or SOC 2 compliant systems
- Celery and Redis for async background processing
- OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect implementation experience
- Strong automated testing discipline (TDD preferred)

Nice to have:
- Prior healthcare or radiology domain knowledge
- AWS deployments with CircleCI or GitHub Actions
- Real-time features (WebSockets, SSE, long polling)

title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
Altitude Labs is a remote-first product studio building 0→1 products for enterprise clients. We need a Staff Engineer who can own architecture, lead a cross-functional team, and ship high-quality software under real deadlines.

Responsibilities:
- Define technical architecture for new product initiatives
- Lead a team of 4–8 engineers across frontend and backend
- Drive decisions on tech stack, infrastructure, and engineering process
- Build scalable services in Python (FastAPI/Django) and Node.js (NestJS)
- Oversee AWS infrastructure and Kubernetes cluster management
- Mentor senior engineers and establish engineering culture

Requirements:
- 8+ years of software engineering experience
- Proven track record leading teams across full product lifecycles
- Expertise in both Python and Node.js/TypeScript ecosystems
- AWS architecture (multi-service, cross-region deployments)
- Kubernetes in production
- Strong communication for stakeholder management and client-facing work

Nice to have:
- Experience across multiple domains (fintech, healthcare, SaaS)
- Background in startup or agency environments
- Technical writing and ADR (Architecture Decision Record) experience

title: Full Stack Developer — Node.js & React
description:
Shopwave is a modern e-commerce infrastructure company. We're growing our engineering team and need a Full Stack Developer comfortable across the entire stack.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain NestJS microservices for order management, inventory, and payments
- Develop React storefronts with a focus on performance and accessibility
- Design GraphQL schemas and resolvers
- Manage MongoDB data models and optimize queries
- Integrate third-party payment gateways (Stripe, Braintree)
- Write unit and integration tests with Jest and Cypress

Requirements:
- 4+ years of full-stack development
- Strong Node.js with NestJS or Express
- React with modern hooks and functional component patterns
- GraphQL API design and consumption
- MongoDB data modeling
- Stripe or equivalent payment integration experience

Nice to have:
- Redis caching strategies
- Next.js for server-side-rendered storefronts
- E-commerce domain knowledge

title: Senior Software Engineer — Remote Startup
description:
VelocityHQ is an early-stage SaaS startup (Series A) building developer productivity tools. We're looking for a senior engineer who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast, and cares about craft.

Responsibilities:
- Take ownership of full features from design through deployment
- Build backend services in Python (Flask or FastAPI) and frontend in React/TypeScript
- Set up and maintain CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions)
- Containerize services with Docker; deploy to cloud providers
- Contribute to product decisions and engineering culture in a small team
- Handle customer-reported bugs rapidly in a fast-feedback environment

Requirements:
- 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
- Comfortable across the full stack — backend APIs and React frontends
- Production Python experience (Flask, FastAPI, or Django)
- React with TypeScript; comfortable with state management
- Docker and CI/CD experience
- Startup mindset — autonomous, pragmatic, low-ego

Nice to have:
- Prior Series A or early-stage startup experience
- Experience with developer tooling or platform products
- Interest in AI-assisted development workflows
